title: Design System: Luke Lab · RetroUI baseline

paper.note: Warm paper field, 61.1% of sampled home surface

paper-card.note: White card surface, 25.5% of sampled home surface

paper-code.note: Warm tinted surface for code / docs

yellow.note: Single action / focus accent. Action and interactive emphasis.

shadows.name: focus-inset
shadows.purpose: Focus ring inset on paper surface.

narrative.northStar: RetroUI — warm paper, hard ink, offset rules
narrative.overview: The site canvas is a warm #FFF7E8 paper field. Black rules, yellow accent, hard 2–4px offset shadows that read as printed marks. Display type (Bricolage Grotesque) carries section identity; Geist handles body and UI. Zero border-radius on cards and controls. The dossier sub-theme is a scoped overlay — it reads the same paper-and-ink language with added surveillance atmosphere.
keyCharacteristics: Paper #FFF7E8 as the continuous field — warm, not neutral
Hard black offset shadows: 2px/3px/4px, zero blur, zero spread
Bricolage Grotesque for display headings; Geist for body; Geist Mono for code/meta
4px radius on cards and controls; pill (9999px) for tags only
#FFDC58 yellow as the sole action/focus accent — not decoration
Decorative mint/purple/pink each under 2.2% screen area
Black (#000000) ink for borders and primary text — no carbon, no void

rules.name: Paper First
rules.body: The background is always #FFF7E8 paper. Do not default to dark. The dossier sub-theme scopes atmosphere onto this same paper field.

rules.name: Hard Shadow Only
rules.body: Box-shadow must be Npx Npx 0 #000000 (or the accent color). Zero blur, zero spread. Soft shadows are prohibited in any UI elevation role.

rules.name: Yellow as Single Accent
rules.body: #FFDC58 is the only active emphasis color. Mint, purple, and pink are decorative — they never carry meaning or interactive state.

rules.name: Display / Body Split
rules.body: Bricolage Grotesque for 24px+ display levels. Geist for body/UI. Geist Mono for code and metadata. Do not mix roles.

rules.name: 4px Radius Cap
rules.body: Cards and interactive controls use 4px radius. Pills use 9999px. Nothing else gets rounded corners.

dos: Do use #FFF7E8 as the default page background.
Do use hard 2–4px offset black shadows for all card/control elevation.
Do use translate(-2px, -2px) + shadow expansion at hover.
Do use Bricolage Grotesque for display headings, Geist for body, Geist Mono for code.
Do use #FFDC58 for single-channel action emphasis.
Do keep decorative colors (mint, purple, pink) under 2.2% screen area.
Do use 4px radius on cards and controls, 9999px on pills only.
donts: Don't use soft blurred box-shadows. Zero blur is non-negotiable.
Don't use dark backgrounds as the default — dossier atmosphere is a scoped overlay.
Don't use mint/purple/pink as interactive or informational signals.
Don't give cards or controls radius above 4px (except pill tags).
Don't load multiple decorative fonts — display/body/mono is the complete set.
Don't use gradient text or glassmorphism.
Don't mix multiple accent colors on a single surface.
